mealAnalysis.guidance_message: This salad is a healthy, low-carbohydrate option that is very diabetes-friendly. It is rich in fiber from the vegetables, low in calories, and unlikely to cause a rapid rise in blood sugar. You can enjoy this meal without concern, but be mindful of additions like dressings that may contain hidden sugars.
mealAnalysis.meal_description: A simple salad consisting of lettuce, shredded carrots, shredded cabbage, and a light vinaigrette dressing.
